query:
-- Corrigir "Recebido" para income
UPDATE transactions 
SET type = 'income', status = 'paid'
WHERE source = 'import_excel'
  AND description = 'Recebido'
  AND type = 'expense';

-- Corrigir "Depósito InfinitePay" para income
UPDATE transactions 
SET type = 'income', status = 'paid'
WHERE source = 'import_excel'
  AND description = 'Depósito InfinitePay'
  AND type = 'expense';

-- Verificar resultado
SELECT description, type, COUNT(*) as qtd, SUM(amount) as total
FROM transactions 
WHERE source = 'import_excel'
  AND description IN ('Recebido', 'Enviado', 'Depósito InfinitePay')
GROUP BY description, type
ORDER BY description, type;

-- Corrigir "Depósito InfinitePay" para income
UPDATE transactions 
SET type = 'income', status = 'paid'
WHERE source = 'import_excel'
  AND description = 'Depósito InfinitePay'
  AND type = 'expense';

-- Verificar resultado
SELECT description, type, COUNT(*) as qtd, SUM(amount) as total
FROM transactions

GROUP BY description, type
